title: How to Build A Self-Improving System with Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents a five-step B.U.I.L.D. Framework for building self-improving systems using Claude Code. The framework covers creating the foundation, bulk data ingestion, setting up data pipelines, implementing improvement loops, and operationalizing the system. The approach emphasizes automating feedback and allowing systems to improve iteratively rather than over-engineering.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through a 5-step B.U.I.L.D. Framework for constructing self-improving systems with Claude Code. The steps cover building a base framework, ingesting data, setting up pipelines, implementing improvement loops, and avoiding over-engineering. The emphasis falls on automating data pipelines and refining the system iteratively rather than adding unnecessary complexity.
